title: eriogonum latens
intro: Eriogonum latens, also known as hidden buckwheat, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the buckwheat family. This shrub-like plant is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eriogonum latens has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
